clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation in macroscopic limbic and salience networks, reflecting the broad functional axis of processing emotional valence, systemic arousal, and mood state.

Mapped onto striatal and ventromedial prefrontal reward circuitry, these concepts represent the overarching functional domain of computing subjective value to drive goal-directed behavior and behavioral selection.

United by the default mode network, these terms reflect internally directed, abstract referential processing that spans both self-referential (autobiographical) and other-referential (social) cognition.
